creator: draco@marino.st
text:
I never received any of these follow-up questions, I just stumbled on 
the PR.

lang/gnat-aux has been removed as a dependency.  As soon as these PR's 
are submitted, there will be no conflicts unless you are trying to build 
the gnatdroid* ports.  lang/gcc-aux will be selected automatically with 
the future "USES+= ada" functionality.
